title: Dow Notches Strongest Month of Trading Since 1976
text: At +11%, it's the best October on record for the blue-chip index and the strongest single-month of trading since the U.S. Bicentennial.

title: Sysco's (SYY) Q1 Earnings Upcoming: Key Factors to Note
text: Sysco's (SYY) first-quarter fiscal 2023 results are likely to reflect gains from the Recipe for Growth program and a diversified model, whereas high costs might have been a concern.

title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For November 2022
text: NOBL fell 9.15% in September, which brings the Funds return for the year to a loss of 17.47%. Thus far this month, through October 24th, the dividend aristocrat ETF is up 6.04%, bringing its year-to-date return to -12.49%.

title: 1 Sysco driver/warehouse worker strike over, 2nd may end soon
text: One of the two Teamsters strikes against units of food transporter and supplier Sysco Corp. has been settled, while the second is on the verge of ending. According to the Buffalo News and television station WWNY, that had not been confirmed by either the Teamsters or Sysco by publication time, the strike against the Sysco facilities in Syracuse, New York, ended earlier this week.

title: 7 Consumer Staples Stocks to Buy in a Falling Market
text: Consumer staples are items considered essential for everyday life. This category typically includes clothing, food, and personal care items that everyone purchases on a regular basis.

title: Sysco (SYY) is a Top-Ranked Growth Stock: Should You Buy?

title: My 11 Best Dividend Kings For October 2022
text: The 45 Dividend Kings finished September with the worst loss this year, collectively losing 8.34%. Last month, the 11 best dividend kings based on forecasted growth and valuation underperformed the average dividend king return by 5 bps.

title: Sysco To Release First Quarter Fiscal Year 2023 Financial Results On November 1
text: HOUSTON, Oct. 04, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Sysco Corporation (NYSE:SYY) will host a conference call and webcast to discuss its first quarter fiscal year 2023 financial results at 10 a.m. EDT on Tuesday, Nov. 1, 2022.
